data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192A0D: LANETTE: Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pI'm sorry everything is so cluttered...\nWhen I get engrossed in research,\lthings end up this way...\pThis is embarrassing... Please keep\nthis a secret in exchange for this.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192ACC: May I offer advice about my POKéMON\nStorage System?\pYou should organize your BOXES so you\ncan tell which POKéMON are in them.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192B4A: It's LANETTE's research notes.\nThere's information about BOXES.\pDesign BOXES to hold 30 POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER should be able to store\n420 POKéMON on the PC system.\pKeep reading?
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192C01: A marking system should be added to\nmake POKéMON easier to organize.\pThe name and wallpaper design of each\nBOX will be made changeable to please\lthe stored POKéMON.\pKeep reading?
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192CB4:
When storing a POKéMON, it should be
sent to the BOX inspected last.\pIf that BOX is full, the received
POKéMON is stored in the next BOX.\pIn other words, when a BOX is examined,
it is automatically selected as the BOX\lto which POKéMON are sent.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192DC1:
There's an e-mail from someone on
the PC.\p“... ... ... ... ... ... ...\p“Your Storage System offers more
convenience than mine.\p“It has a lot of user-friendly features
that make it fun and useful, too.\p“It makes me proud that I played
a part in its development.\p“Here's hoping that you'll continue
research in Storage Systems.\p“From BILL
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...”
